problem_text_cn: 1397 一直径为$2a$，凸面曲率半径为$R$的平凸透镜水平放置，受到竖直向上的激光束照射。为使它能悬在空中而不下落，激光的功率$P$与强度$I$应为多少？已知透镜材料的折射率为$n$，密度为$\rho$。设激光束充满透镜，并均视为近轴光。设$n = 1.50$，$R = 5\ \mathrm{mm}$，$a = 1\ \mathrm{mm}$，$\rho = 2.5\ \mathrm{g \cdot cm^{-3}}$，$g = 9.8\ \mathrm{m \cdot s^{-2}}$，求出$P$与$I$之数值。
problem_text_en: 1397 A plano-convex lens with diameter $2a$ and convex curvature radius $R$ is placed horizontally and irradiated by a vertically upward laser beam. To make it suspend in the air without falling, what should be the laser power $P$ and intensity $I$? Given the refractive index of the lens material is $n$ and density is $\rho$. Assume the laser beam fills the lens and is paraxial. Let $n = 1.50$, $R = 5\ \mathrm{mm}$, $a = 1\ \mathrm{mm}$, $\rho = 2.5\ \mathrm{g \cdot cm^{-3}}$, $g = 9.8\ \mathrm{m \cdot s^{-2}}$, find the numerical values of $P$ and $I$.
problem_solution_cn:
【核心思路】光子经透镜折射后动量改变，对透镜产生向上的力。透镜焦距$f =  rac{R}{n-1}$，光子动量$p =  rac{h
u}{c}$，离轴$r$处光子动量改变$p_y = p(1 - \cos	heta)$，积分得总作用力$F =  rac{\pi N h
u}{c}[a^2 - 2f^2(\sqrt{1 + a^2/f^2} - 1)]$。透镜体积$V =  rac{\pi}{3}H^2(3R - H)$（$H = R - \sqrt{R^2 - a^2}$），力平衡$F = Vho g$，得$P = \pi a^2 N h
u =  rac{\pi c H^2(3R - H)ho g}{3[1 - 2 rac{f^2}{a^2}(\sqrt{1 + a^2/f^2} - 1)]}$，$I =  rac{P}{\pi a^2}$。代入数据得$P = 4.70 	imes 10^5\ \mathrm{W}$，$I = 1.50 	imes 10^{11}\ \mathrm{W/m^2}$。
problem_solution_en:
【Core Idea】Photon momentum changes after refraction by the lens, producing an upward force on the lens. Lens focal length $f =  rac{R}{n-1}$, photon momentum $p =  rac{h
u}{c}$, photon momentum change at off-axis $r$ is $p_y = p(1 - \cos	heta)$, integrate to get total force $F =  rac{\pi N h
u}{c}[a^2 - 2f^2(\sqrt{1 + a^2/f^2} - 1)]$. Lens volume $V =  rac{\pi}{3}H^2(3R - H)$ ($H = R - \sqrt{R^2 - a^2}$), force balance $F = Vho g$, get $P = \pi a^2 N h
u =  rac{\pi c H^2(3R - H)ho g}{3[1 - 2 rac{f^2}{a^2}(\sqrt{1 + a^2/f^2} - 1)]}$, $I =  rac{P}{\pi a^2}$. Substitute data to get $P = 4.70 	imes 10^5\ \mathrm{W}$, $I = 1.50 	imes 10^{11}\ \mathrm{W/m^2}$.
problem_answer: 激光功率：$\boldsymbol{4.70 \times 10^5\ \mathrm{W}}$；激光强度：$\boldsymbol{1.50 \times 10^{11}\ \mathrm{W/m^2}}$；测量关键：光子动量改变产生光压，平衡透镜重力。
